metadata.title: Bluesky
metadata.long_description:
Bluesky is the social app built for better conversations. Find your people, follow what you care about, and have fun online again — without ads or engagement traps.

JOIN THE MOMENT

See what people are talking about right now. From breaking news to big cultural moments, jump into conversations as they unfold and be part of what's happening.

EXPLORE FEEDS

Choose from thousands of community-built feeds covering news, art, pets, science, fandom, investing, culture, and everything in between. Stay updated with people you care about in your Following feed, or dive into new perspectives and trends in Discover.

CONTROL YOUR SCROLL

Use powerful moderation tools and content filters to shape exactly what you see. Hide what you don't want, follow what you do, and decide who can interact with you.

JUMP RIGHT IN

Starter Packs help you get going fast. Follow curated lists of interesting people with one tap and start building your community instantly.

AVOID THE BILLIONAIRES

The internet is too important to be controlled by a handful of powerful people. Bluesky is building an open, community-driven foundation for the social internet. With one account, you can use the Bluesky app and take your identity anywhere on the growing ecosystem of apps built on the same protocol.

versions.release_notes:
Bot labels are here. Users who run an automated account can now add a badge to their profile so others know what's a bot and what's not.

We also snuck in some small updates like improved suggestions for who to follow, better audio quality in videos, and various bug fixes.

- Translate posts without leaving the app
- Fresh new look thanks to iOS 26
- Re-arrange your pinned feeds by dragging and dropping them
- Many small bug fixes and improvements

We're working on some exciting new features and we can't wait to share more very soon. In the meantime, this release contains a few highly requested things such as:
- Support for Bandcamp embeds
- The ability to convert a Starter Pack to a List
- A "Renew" button for expired mute words

And of course a whole bunch of bug fixes and performance improvements.

Drafts are finally here! For all the overthinkers and perfectionists out there.

We've updated our welcome screen with some fresh artwork by @odpomery.bsky.social, an artist from the Bluesky community.

Plus, we improved how GIFs display in posts so that they appear more like classic GIFs (autoplaying without sound) and not like videos.

Oh, and there are a bunch of performance improvements and a couple bug fixes too, of course.
More bug fixes and performance improvements. Next release is gonna be a banger tho :)

Live Now is in open beta! Anyone can now add a temporary LIVE badge to their avatar, helping others discover that they're currently live-streaming on Twitch.

Cashtags are finally here. Think hashtags, but for stocks. Now you can see everyone else's equally unqualified analysis!

Plus, we've squeezed in some bug fixes and performance improvements to make the app feel a bit snappier.
Just some bug fixes and improvements

Today, we're introducing Find Friends — a new way to find the people you know on Bluesky with your phone contacts. Unlike other apps, we've invented a far more secure way to handle contact data, and we put full control of it in your hands.

Social media used to be about connecting with friends. Somewhere along the way, that got lost in the noise of viral content and algorithms. It's time to bring friends back.

- Made all the buttons round again
- The "Who can reply" dialog has a fresh look
- New granular reporting reasons
- Even more bug fixes and performance enhancements

- Made all the buttons round again
- The "Who can reply" dialog has a fresh look
- New granular reporting reasons
- Various other bug fixes and performance enhancements

- New app icon
- Refreshed color scheme
- Added a new Finance interest
- Many bug fixes and performance improvements

- Bookmarks are here!
- Bug fixes and performance improvements

- Custom feeds can now enable the "Show more"/"Show less" buttons
- The image/video buttons in the composer has been unified into a single button
- You can now add people directly to a starter pack in the "…" menu on their profile
- Performance improvements and bug fixes

- Fixes an issue where translations should fail to open in the Google Translate app
- Fixes an issue where some devices always opened to the Notifications tab
- Muted threads are now also filtered from feeds
- Visual improvements to suggested accounts and trending videos modules
- Bug fixes and performance improvements

- Activity notifications are now filtered by muted words
- Introduced new age assurance requirements for UK users
- Multiple bugfixes

- Activity subscriptions: receive push notifications when users post by subscribing to their activity.
- More detailed notification settings: change which notifications you receive and from whom.
- New notification types: likes on reposts, reposts of reposts.
- Multiple visual improvements to post threads.
- Fixed a bug which made it difficult to link to search results.
- Multiple other bugfixes.

- New share menu on posts
- Likes and reposts on your reposts now show in your notifications
- New translation: Portuguese (PT)
